subject: fix(ui): raise header z-index so burger menu opens above sticky tab bar
body:
The hamburger dropdown (z-index: 100) was being covered by the sticky
tabs-bar (also z-index: 100) because the header had no explicit z-index.
Giving the header z-index: 101 creates the correct stacking context.

Tags: ui, bug
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-ux
Semver: patch
